title: Director of MIT Bengaluru
content: Dr. Iven Jose serves as the Director of the Engineering Program at Manipal Institute of Technology (MIT) Bengaluru, overseeing the institution's strategic, academic, and administrative operations.

title: CSE Department Head
content: Dr. Prema K V is the Head of the Department of Computer Science and Engineering, concurrently serving as the Joint Director of the MIT Bengaluru campus.

title: IT Department Faculty
content: Dr. Dayananda P is the Professor and Dean of the School of Computer Engineering, as well as the Head of the Information Technology department at MIT Bengaluru.

title: AIML Department Faculty
content: Dr. Tusar Kanti Mishra is a leading Associate Professor at MIT Bengaluru, specializing in Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, and IoT product development.

title: B.Tech CSE Seat Intake
content: Operating on a strict micro-cohort model, the B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) at MIT Bengaluru has a highly restricted seat intake of exactly 60 students.

title: B.Tech IT Seat Intake
content: The B.Tech in Information Technology (IT) program ensures optimal faculty-to-student ratios by maintaining a maximum intake capacity of 60 students.

title: Specialized B.Tech Programs
content: MIT Bengaluru offers specialized B.Tech programs in Cyber Security, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Financial Technology, and VLSI Design & Technology.

title: Highest Placement CTC
content: The highest CTC offered to MIT Bengaluru students during recent placement drives reached an impressive 57.04 LPA, with peaks up to 69 LPA reported in combined drives.

title: Average Placement CTC
content: Demonstrating strong market absorption, the average CTC for MIT Bengaluru graduates currently stands between approximately 10.49 LPA and 12.59 LPA.

title: Top Recruiters
content: Top recruiting companies for campus placements include Microsoft, Amazon, Deloitte, Capgemini, Infosys, Shell, McKinsey, and TCS.

title: Campus Location
content: The MIT Bengaluru campus is strategically located in Govindapura, Yelahanka, North Bengaluru, offering close proximity to major aerospace and IT corridors.

title: Hostel Curfew Policy
content: Hostel curfews are strictly enforced with a mandatory in-time of 9:30 PM for safety, monitored via advanced facial recognition and biometric punch-in systems.

title: Library Resources
content: The central library provides 24/7 digital access via OpenAthens to over 100,000 e-books, 9,200 online journals (including IEEE and Scopus), and 150,000 print resources.

title: Annual Technical Fest
content: The campus hosts 'Tech Solstice' (under the NEXUS Fest umbrella) as its flagship annual technical festival, serving as a platform for hackathons, robotics, and coding.

title: Minimum Attendance Requirement
content: Students are strictly mandated to maintain a minimum attendance of 75% in each subject; failure results in a Detention (DT) grade and barring from end-semester exams.

title: B.Tech CSE Tuition Fee
content: The academic tuition fee for the flagship B.Tech Computer Science program is INR 6,18,000 for the first year, totaling approximately INR 24,42,000 across the four-year duration.

title: Innovation Center Incubator
content: The MUTBI Innovation Center on campus provides seed funding, workspace, and mentorship for student-led startups, supported by an AICTE IDEA LAB.

title: ECE Department Focus
content: The Electronics and Communication Engineering department focuses heavily on VLSI Design and embedded systems, directly aligning with the India Semiconductor Mission.

title: Campus Sports Facilities
content: Campus sports facilities include the MARENA indoor complex, a natural turf cricket field, an Astroturf football ground, and synthetic basketball and tennis courts.

title: Medical Assistance 24/7
content: Medical assistance is available 24/7 on campus through dedicated Health Coordinators, an on-site clinic, and integration with the expansive Manipal Hospitals network.
